name: Scrap Metal
description: A jagged bit of the facility that fell off. The Warden calls this 'decor'.

name: Plank
description: Certified 30% splinter by volume.

name: Rope
description: Standard-issue escape prevention rope. Ironic.

name: Cloth
description: Torn from a previous subject's jumpsuit. They won't need it.

name: Goo Blob
description: It's warm. Nobody knows why it's warm.

name: Glow Mushroom
description: Cold to the touch. Smells like regret and blueberries.

name: Cog
description: Every facility runs on these. This one runs slightly worse now.

name: Spring Coil
description: Boing potential: considerable.

name: Hammer
description: Swing with F. Brittle things (cracks, ice) shatter. Percussive problem solving.

name: Torch (unlit)
description: Cloth on a stick. Touch it to something burning and it becomes a very good stick.

name: Torch (lit)
description: Fire on demand. Burns wood and goo, melts ice, upsets certain creatures. Water puts it right out.

name: Bucket (empty)
description: Swing it at water to scoop. The facility's most advanced technology.

name: Bucket (water)
description: Sloshing and ready. Douses fire, washes goo away. Refillable.

name: Frost Vial
description: Mushroom cold, concentrated. Freezes water solid, chills creatures. One use.

name: Spark Rod
description: A cog's teeth and a bad idea. Charge runs through metal and water. Mind your feet.

name: Spring
description: F places it, anything that lands on it launches. E picks it back up. Bring your own architecture.

name: Smoke Bomb
description: Stuns nearby creatures the old-fashioned way. Also great at parties.

name: Sticky Trap
description: Place it down. Creatures that touch it are done having a good time.

name: Warden Plush
description: A hand-stitched plush of the Warden. Someone made this. Someone loved this.

name: Sock Puppet
description: It does nothing. It judges you. The Warden loves him.
